trustDefaults.sourceNote: Selected starter preview modules from the live Viet pack. The website stays intentionally smaller than the app.
trustDefaults.appBoundary: The app carries the deeper backup for the same trip moments: broader coverage, search, saved phrases, and offline use.
trustDefaults.correctionsLabel: Report a phrase or audio gap

modules.headline: The starter phrases that help you get by on day one
modules.summary: Greeting, thanks, apology, and a polite no. This is the free preview layer: small on purpose, useful fast, and a clean handoff into the deeper app backup.

cta.secondaryLabel: See the full Vietnam phrase guide

modules.headline: The starter arrival phrases that keep the first handoff from turning sloppy
modules.summary: Use these app-aligned starter lines for immigration, baggage, pickup, and the first airport problem. Small on purpose, fast under pressure, and still only a preview of the deeper app backup.

modules.headline: The starter transport phrases that fix the address, fare, and meter problems first
modules.summary: These are the short transport lines from the app starter layer that matter when the ride, route, or handoff gets tense. Phrase-first, audio-ready, and still clearly smaller than the app backup.

modules.headline: The starter money phrases that protect the total before the moment gets expensive
modules.summary: Use this small money slice for price checks, final totals, ATM help, and one real payment problem. It stays app-aligned and starter-only instead of pretending the website now carries the full free layer.

cta.secondaryLabel: See the full Vietnam phrase guide

modules.headline: The starter phone and SIM phrases that get you back online fast
modules.summary: A tight starter set for Wi-Fi, SIMs, eSIMs, and the first map failure. These are selected starter preview modules from the app starter layer, not a separate website phone system.

cta.secondaryLabel: Read the SIM and offline guide

modules.headline: The repair phrases that stop a small miss from turning into a bigger problem
modules.summary: Use these starter repair lines when you miss the number, speed, or sentence. They preview the do-not-get-stuck layer without pretending the website is the whole phrasebook.

cta.secondaryLabel: See the full Vietnam phrase guide

modules.headline: The first food and coffee phrases worth carrying into Vietnam
modules.summary: A starter slice for coffee, bottled water, spice, and takeaway. Enough to get the first order out cleanly before the deeper app backup matters.

cta.secondaryLabel: See the full Vietnam phrase guide
